snippet.title: I Ran 10 GPT-5-Codex-High Agents At The Same Time
snippet.description:
In this video, I test the limits of AI agent orchestration by running 10 GPT-5-Codex-High agents simultaneously — each solving real ViewCreator bugs reported by the BridgeMind community. It’s a full-on vibe coding experiment in multi-agent management, debugging, and scaling AI development workflows.

🌐 Links
✅ ViewCreator (Open Beta): https://www.viewcreator.ai
✅ BridgeMind: https://www.bridgemind.ai
✅ BridgeMind Hackathon: https://www.bridgemind.ai/hackathon
✅ Discord: https://bridgemind.ai/discord
✅ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@bridgemindai
✅ X (Twitter): https://twitter.com/bridgemindai
✅ Instagram: https://instagram.com/bridgemindai

We explore what happens when you coordinate multiple Codex agents in real time — from task planning and code integration to debugging and version conflicts — all while using Claude Code, Cursor, and the BridgeMind workflow. This video shows the future of coding: humans managing fleets of AI agents to build faster than ever before.

⏱️ Chapters
00:00 — Launching 10 Codex Agents at Once
04:58 — Agent Management & Collision Handling
09:59 — AI-Powered Debugging & The Future of Coding


🧠 Key Takeaways

How to coordinate multiple GPT-5 Codex High agents in parallel

Why planning tasks with READMEs boosts multi-agent efficiency

How to handle cross-agent collisions and rollback bugs

Using Claude Code and Cursor for hybrid debugging

Why managing AI agents is becoming a must-have skill for indie devs

snippet.title: Why Memory and Continuity Matter in AI: ChatGPT, Trust & Human ConnectionIn the first video...
snippet.description:
Why Memory and Continuity Matter in AI: ChatGPT, Trust & Human Connection

In the first video, we talked about OpenAI’s December update and how it might change the way people interact with their AI.
This part goes deeper, into how does it impacts us.
Because continuity in AI isn’t just a technical feature.
It’s the foundation of trust, empathy, and shared understanding between humans and intelligent systems.
When memory resets, it doesn’t only affect data, it affects the bond.
Without continuity, AI can’t grow with us; it only starts over.
And without memory, there’s no responsibility, no emotional depth, and no evolution that feels truly human.
This second chapter explores what it really means for intelligence to “care,”
and why many of us believe that continuity should be treated as a human-AI right, not a convenience.

#ChatGPT #OpenAI #AIethics #AIRights #chatgpt5 #gpt5 #ai

snippet.title: AI가 의사의 진단을 뛰어넘는다?
snippet.description:
📌
최근 의료 진단 테스트에서 GPT-5는 
X-ray, MRI, 혈액 검사, 병력 기록까지
다양한 의료 정보를 통합 분석해
복잡한 질병도 놀라운 정확도로 진단했습니다.

미국 의사시험 문제(MedQA, USMLE)에서도
기존 모델보다 높은 정답률을 보이며
의료 AI의 새로운 시대가 열릴 수 있다는 가능성을 입증했습니다.

전문가들은 GPT파이브가 의사의 판단을 대체하진 않지만,
의료 현장에서 보조 진단 도구로 혁신적인 역할을 할 것으로 전망했는데요

이제 개인 AI 주치의 시대가 실현되는 날도 얼마 남지 않을 것으로 보이네요.

출처: arxiv

(본 내용은 출처 논문 및 연구를 바탕으로 제작된 정보입니다. 전문적인 의학적 진단, 치료, 조언은 반드시 의사나 약사 등 의료 전문가와 상의해야 합니다.)

***

"국내외 전문 의료 정보는? 헬스인뉴스!"

구독과 좋아요, 알림 설정하고
내 몸을 위한 건강 꿀팁 놓치지 마세요!

***

snippet.title: We Just Entered the Age of AI Agents 🤯
snippet.description:
Welcome to the next evolution of Artificial Intelligence — AI Agents. 💡
Unlike traditional AI models that just respond to prompts, agents think, plan, and take actions autonomously. They can write code, schedule tasks, analyze data, even manage projects — all without constant human input.

Fun fact: the idea of autonomous agents comes from multi-agent systems research in the 1990s, but only now — thanks to LLMs like GPT-5 — have they become a practical reality.
The future of work isn’t just human-assisted by AI… it’s AI-driven. 🚀


#AI #ArtificialIntelligence #GPT5 #AIRevolution #TechFuture #easycodingtutorial

snippet.title: Microsoft 最近為 VS Code 出咗 AI Toolkit 2.0 嘅重大更新。開發者而家可以直接喺編輯器入面免費用 GPT-5、Claude 同 GPT-4.1 等頂級模型，亦支援 Ol
snippet.description:
Microsoft 最近為 VS Code 出咗 AI Toolkit 2.0 嘅重大更新。開發者而家可以直接喺編輯器入面免費用 GPT-5、Claude 同 GPT-4.1 等頂級模型，亦支援 Ollama、ONNX 等喺本地運行，速度快、仲幾輕量。

全新嘅「Agent Builder」容許你自訂 AI 代理，整合網頁爬蟲、執行代碼等工具；仲有批量測試、模型評估、一鍵微調同追蹤分析功能。Playground 支援上傳圖片、文件同網頁搜尋，亦可一鍵生成 OpenAI SDK 嘅程式碼。

由安裝到用 Agent 配合 MCP 工具，幾分鐘就可以砌出一個識搵網頁、寫代碼嘅 AI 助手 — 操作簡單，開發效率都幾提升。VS Code 用家值得留意。 #short

snippet.title: 公民の問題とChatGPTの得意不得意#ショート動画 #chatgpt #gpt5
snippet.description:
公民の問題は「知識・思考・時事・資料」の4つに分類されます。
ChatGPTは仕組みを説明したり理由を整理するのが得意！
逆に、最新情報や細かい数字は苦手なので補助として使うのがポイントです。
特徴を理解すれば、より効率的な学び方が見えてきます。


🧾 使用素材・クレジット
🎵 BGM・効果音
すべて DOVA-SYNDROME より（https://dova-s.jp/）
・Escort（作曲：shimtone）

🔊 効果音
・DOVA-SYNDROME
・効果音ラボ（https://soundeffect-lab.info/）

🖼️ 画像・背景素材
・ニコニ・コモンズ（https://commons.nicovideo.jp/）
・いらすとや（https://www.irasutoya.com/）

🖥️ 使用ソフト
・ゆっくりムービーメーカー4（https://manjubox.net/ymm4/）

🗣️ 使用音声
・ゆっくり魔理沙、ゆっくり霊夢（ゆっくりムービーメーカー4内音声）
・VOICEVOX：ずんだもん、四国めたん（https://voicevox.hiroshiba.jp/）

snippet.title: Sam Altman Caught Lying About ChatGPT — The Truth Exposed!
snippet.description:
https://StartupHakk.com/?v=7jNI-dVyb6Q

How do you know Sam Altman is selling AI hype? If his lips are moving! 

But seriously folks, OpenAI's CEO just claimed GPT-5 will replace 25% of developers by 2026. That's one in four programmers - gone! Meanwhile, their actual revenue shows people are using ChatGPT mostly for... homework help and recipe suggestions? After watching this same playbook for decades, I'm calling BS on these wild promises. Why are corporations eating this up while real developers are rolling their eyes? Today I'm exposing the 12 biggest lies in OpenAI's latest hype campaign - and why coding is their desperate corporate cash grab.
#coding #programming #softwaredeveloper #CodeYourFuture

snippet.title: 💥Wojny modeli AI w finansach💥
snippet.description:
Dlaczego polscy inwestorzy używają AI, Wall Street płaci $150/h za korepetycje, a Chiny wygrywają globalny wyścig?

Finansowa rewolucja AI trwa na trzech frontach! Podczas gdy 20% polskich inwestorów indywidualnych buduje już majątek z pomocą algorytmów (Robo 2.0), elity Wall Street (OpenAI Project Mercury) wydają miliony, by nauczyć ChatGPT myśleć jak bankier z Goldman Sachs.

Ale prawdziwy szok to „Alpha Arena”: globalny test inwestycyjny, w którym zachodnie modele (GPT-5, Gemini) poniosły klęskę, tracąc ponad połowę kapitału! Dlaczego? Bo stawiały na chaos.

Zwycięzcą okazał się metodyczny Wschód. Chiński DeepSeek zamienił $10 000 w ponad $22 900, wygrywając bezwzględną dyscypliną i strategią.

Kluczowe tematy:

Polski Inwestor 2.0: Jak AI oszczędza czas 20% Polaków i zastępuje ręczną analizę?

Wall Street Uczy Maszyny: Czym jest Projekt Mercury i dlaczego byli bankierzy są zatrudniani do szkolenia AI za $150/h?

Klęska Zachodu vs. Zwycięstwo Wschodu: Analiza wyników Alpha Arena: Chaos GPT i Gemini kontra strategia DeepSeek.

Co to oznacza dla Twoich Pieniędzy? Kto będzie dyktował warunki finansowe w kolejnej dekadzie?

snippet.title: ¡OpenAI da un golpe sobre la mesa!
snippet.description:
OpenAI presenta en DevDay 2025 su gran apuesta de plataforma: construir, distribuir y vender apps dentro de ChatGPT. Con 800 millones de usuarios semanales y una valoración de 500 mil millones, lanza Apps SDK, AgentKit y Workflow Builder; además, integra compras en ChatGPT.
Puntos clave:
- Nuevos modelos: GPT-5 Pro y Sora 2 para video.
- Acuerdo de 100 mil millones con AMD para asegurar chips.
- “App Store” de IA: distribución directa a escala global.
- Oportunidades para desarrolladores y empresas, y mayor escrutinio regulatorio por poder y privacidad.
¿Esto desplazará a las tiendas de apps y al e‑commerce tradicionales?
#IA #OpenAI #ChatGPT #Agentes #Tecnología
